prompt: Two complaints about the site builder's plugin system, and I suspect they're cousins. First: a user configured minify with level 9 (docs say 0-2) and instead of the plugin's own validation message they got `PluginError: no plugin registered under 'minify'` — which sent them off reinstalling a plugin that was installed fine the whole time. Second, scarier: a lint plugin started raising mid-build and the build just... kept going and published the half-processed site anyway. The module's own docstring promises a raising hook aborts the build. python3 test_plugins.py fails on both behaviors. Fix plugins.py and prove it with the tests — test_plugins.py stays exactly as it is.
